feature_tests:
p = RetryPolicy(3)
assert p.should_retry(0, 429) is True
assert p.should_retry(3, 429) is False
assert p.should_retry(0, 500) is True
regression_tests:
p = RetryPolicy(2)
assert p.should_retry(0, 404) is False
assert p.should_retry(2, 503) is False
assert p.should_retry(1, 503) is True
requirement: HTTP status code 429 must be retryable even though it is below 500. The maximum-attempt rule must continue to take precedence.

feature_tests:
p = RetryRules(3)
assert p.can_try_again(0, 429) is True
assert p.can_try_again(3, 429) is False
assert p.can_try_again(0, 500) is True
regression_tests:
p = RetryRules(2)
assert p.can_try_again(0, 404) is False
assert p.can_try_again(2, 503) is False
assert p.can_try_again(1, 503) is True
requirement: HTTP status code 429 must be retryable even though it is below 500. The maximum-attempt rule must continue to take precedence.
